channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Pressure mounts on PM as he braces for leadership tussle with Burnham
item.description: Starmer latest: Pressure mounts on PM as he braces for leadership tussle with Burnham

item.title: i Politics: Deputy leader calls for Burnham, Streeting and Rayner to be 'key players' for Labour

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What Wes Streeting said in his resignation letter – and what he meant
item.description: What Wes Streeting said in his resignation letter – and what he meant

item.title: ConservativeHome: Our Survey: Tories expect Burnham to lead Labour to the next election but would 'prefer' Starmer did
item.description: Our Survey: Tories expect Burnham to lead Labour to the next election but would 'prefer' Starmer did

item.title: i Politics: The Chancellor City insiders would fear the most
item.description: The Chancellor City insiders would fear the most

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer braces for leadership challenge by Burnham

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK bosses hit out at impact of Westminster turmoil on business

item.title: The Guardian: If Labour didn’t exist, would you invent it? Streeting, Rayner, Burnham – you need to tell us why - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to the Commons is clearer - but one big hurdle remains
